* Basic Patterns
ONE AND SEVEN & FIVE AND THIRTEEN
Instrument,16-Beat Bit-String
BD,1000001000000000
SN,0000100000001000
BOOTS N' CATS
Instrument,16-Beat Bit-String
BD,1000000010000000
SN,0000100000001000
CH,1010101010101010
TINY HOUSE
Instrument,16-Beat Bit-String
BD,1000100010001000
OH,0010001000100010
GOOD TO GO
Instrument,16-Beat Bit-String
BD,1001001000100000
SN,0000100000001000
HIP HOP (Basic)
Instrument,16-Beat Bit-String
BD,1010001100000010
SN,0000100000001000
CH,1010101010101010

BD,1000000010000000
SN,0000000010000000
CH,1010101010101010
